item.description:
### Fixed - Codex integration now works when Codex is installed through a version manager (nvm, fnm, Volta and similar). Perch could find Codex but not run it: the launcher needs `node` sitting beside it, and Perch wasn't looking there. This is what kept 0.4.13's session-end tracking and 0.4.12's hook check from doing anything on those setups.
### Note - On Codex 0.145 or newer this adds one more Codex hook. Codex asks you to approve new hooks before it runs them — Perch will say so in Settings. Run `/hooks` in Codex and trust Perch's entry.
